title: Full Stack Engineer
jd_text: A global commodity trading firm is looking for a Software Engineer with 2-5 years' experience to join its technology team building real-time, data-driven trading systems. This is a hands-on role where you'll work on production platforms supporting intraday and near-real-time trading decisions, gaining exposure to fast-paced commodity markets and modern engineering practices. What you'll be doing: Designing and developing distributed, data-intensive systems. Building real-time and near-real-time trading solutions. Working closely with traders, analysts, and engineers. Developing APIs, data pipelines, and streaming architectures. Applying modern engineering standards and tooling. Learning the nuances of physical and financial commodity trading workflows. What we're looking for: 2-5 years' commercial software engineering experience. Strong skills in Python, JavaScript, SQL, or another modern language. Exposure to data engineering and/or streaming platforms (e.g. Kafka). Hands-on experience with AWS and/or Azure. Knowledge of relational and analytical databases. A learner mindset and desire to grow into a more senior role. Nice to have: Kubernetes or containerised environments. Time-series or low-latency data systems. Exposure to trading, pricing, or risk platforms. Interest in AI or emerging technologies in trading. Requirements: 3+ years of work experience with AWS. 3+ years of experience in IT. 3+ years of work experience with Python. 3+ years of work experience with React.js.
label: bad_fit

Evidence of successful collection concepts and commercial product design.Technical Proficiency – Advanced proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign), with knowledge of production specifications, file management, and print production processes.Commercial Awareness – Understanding of brand guidelines, retail requirements, and production constraints. Ability to balance creative vision with commercial viability.Collaborative Approach – Strong communication skills, ability to work collaboratively across teams (NPD, Marketing, Retail), and openness to feedback and iteration.Attention to Detail – Precision in artwork preparation, colour accuracy, and regulatory compliance. Keen eye for design excellence and brand consistency.Problem Solving – Creative approach to design challenges, ability to manage competing priorities, and resilience under tight deadlines. About Our Design TeamWe are the heart of Heathcote & Ivory. We're creatives who take pride in producing beautiful, commercially successful designs that resonate with consumers and drive retail performance. title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
jd_text: Ready to architect the next generation of point-of-sale financing technology? At DigniFi, you'll build the intelligent systems powering real-time financing decisions for 2,000+ automotive partners nationwide. Our engineering team designs scalable platforms that process thousands of financing applications daily, leveraging cutting-edge machine learning, cloud-native architecture, and seamless API integrations that transform how consumers access automotive financing. You'll tackle fascinating technical challenges: building millisecond-response credit decisioning engines, designing fault-tolerant payment processing systems, and creating intuitive interfaces that work seamlessly across dealership workflows. Working with modern tech stacks including cloud services, containerized microservices, and advanced data pipelines, you'll have the autonomy to architect solutions that directly impact our partners' revenue growth and customer satisfaction. This isn't just another fintech engineering role—you're building the infrastructure that helps working families afford critical car repairs they couldn't otherwise access. Every system you design, every optimization you implement, directly enables someone to keep their vehicle running and maintain their livelihood. Join us in engineering solutions that make automotive financing more accessible, transparent, and immediate than ever before. About The Role As a Senior Full-Stack Engineer, you’ll own critical services and user interfaces that power DigniFi’s embedded financing platform. You’ll architect and implement backend systems and modern web applications, mentor other engineers, and help drive technical strategy as we scale our platform into a suite of domain-driven microservices. What You Will Do Backend Development Own design and development of backend microservice in Java and Ruby. Define API contracts and service boundaries across multiple systems. Optimize performance and reliability using sound algorithmic and data structure principles. Design and evolve data models (MySQL) for scalability and maintainability. Lead improvements to our Kubernetes and Docker microservice environments, CI/CD pipelines, and AWS infrastructure (SQS/SNS, EC2, S3). Implement event-driven patterns for asynchronous workflows. Frontend Development Architect and implement responsive, accessible interfaces using React, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Collaborate with design to maintain and evolve our component library and design system. Drive performance and UX improvements through thoughtful optimization and experimentation. Technical Leadership Mentor teammates through code reviews and design discussions. Help shape coding standards, testing practices, and architectural direction. Partner with Product and other stakeholders to translate business goals into technical outcomes. Identify and lead efforts to reduce technical debt and improve developer productivity. Who You Are 8+ years of professional full-stack experience (preferably in SaaS or fintech). Deep expertise in Java (Spring Boot) development. Proficiency in Ruby on Rails or React frontend development. Expertise in the AWS ecosystem and cloud architecture. Proficient in designing and scaling cloud-based microservices on AWS. Comfortable leading cross-functional initiatives and mentoring peers. Strong understanding of event-driven architecture, CI/CD pipelines, and observability best practices. Pragmatic problem solver who can balance speed, quality, and long-term maintainability. Bachelor’s in CS or related field (or equivalent experience). Kubernetes certification is a plus. Why You’ll Love Working At DigniFi High-growth opportunity with terrific upside potential. Founded to provide aid to people when they unexpectedly need help...responsible, respectful, and transparent access to a better financial future for our customers. Excellence-driven organization that values work/life balance. We’re a tight-knit team that values collaboration and genuinely loves working together. What’s In It For You Flexible PTO 12 Paid Holidays Up to 80% Employer-Paid Premiums for Medical, Dental and Vision Insurance Long-term Disability Insurance Basic Life Insurance Paid Parental Leave Matching 401k 100% Remote Work Where You Will Work Preference is given to candidates located in the Atlanta, Georgia, Denver, Colorado, Dallas/ Fort Worth, Texas, Seattle, Washington, and New York, New York areas. Part of the interview process will require an in-person interview in one of these locations. This position is remote. Salary The salary range for this position is $140,000 - $175,000 a year. DigniFi salary ranges are determined by role, level, and location. The salary range displayed in each job posting reflects the minimum and maximum target for new hire salaries for the position across all US locations. Please note, the base pay offered may vary within the range depending on a wide array of factors including but not limited to work location, job-related knowledge/skills, relevant education/training, and level of experience. Please note that the compensation details listed in postings reflect the base salary only, and do not include bonuses or benefits. Statement Of Non-Discrimination In keeping with our beliefs and goals, no employee or applicant will face discrimination or harassment based on race, color, ancestry, national origin, religion, age, gender, marital/domestic partner status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, disability status, or veteran status. Above and beyond discrimination and harassment based on “protected categories,” we also strive to prevent other subtler forms of inappropriate behavior (i.e., stereotyping) from ever gaining a foothold in our company. Whether blatant or hidden, barriers to success have no place at DigniFi. DigniFi is not considering candidates who require visa sponsorship or visa transfer at this time.… more Benefits found in job post Disability insurance, 401(k), Vision insurance

title: Senior Backend Engineer
jd_text: About the job                                                               ScaleXPScaleXP is a smart finance automation platform. We help SMEs automate their finance and sales operations by integrating disparate business systems. By automating these tasks we save our customers time, give them confidence in their data, and provide insights that were previously not possible. Both the business and team are fast growing. Now is a very interesting time to join ScaleXP.How do we do thisUsing python we integrate with 10+ Accounting, CRM, and payment platforms, we run asynchronous ELT tasks. Storing the data, normalising the data so we can work with data from separate systems like they are the same, and build smart automations on top of this.These automations vary from NLP to extract dates from documents, using elastic search to match separate data sources together, or building time based schedules from multiple data sources.Since there are a lot of variables, edge cases, and complex domain knowledge, we heavily rely on automated testing.Your role in thisIn this role you will:      Work closely with product & customer success to create solutions that actually solve the end users problems.Create and maintain new 3rd party integrations.Create and maintain new automations on top of the imported data.Make POCs/MVPs for potential new features.Support DevOps efforts.Improve the Quality, Scalability, Security, and Reliability of the BE as a whole. Who we're looking forWe're looking for someone with at least,      5+ years of BE development experience.2+ years of Python experience.2+ years of Relational Database experience. Additional experience in the following are a plus: Django, Celery, Postgres, Docker, Terraform, AWS, Integrating 3rd party APIs, building APIs, Unit & Integration testing.We're looking for someone who has an end-to-end mindset. You can take ownership of a task, propose a solution and plan, involve the right parties, asks the right questions, and can deliver independently if necessary.Preferably you're someone that understands no one person knows everything, and is willing to learn, but also explain and teach others.Experience in a startup is a big plus, you enjoy working in a team with rapid iterations.LocationScaleXP is a hybrid working company. We work from our central London office 2 days a week. We do allow the occasional work from abroad, for example to visit family. title: Founding Engineer
jd_text: About the job                                                               This is a job that Jill, our AI Recruiter, is recruiting for on behalf of one of our customers.She will pick the best candidates from Jack's network.The next step is to speak to Jack.Founding EngineerCompany Description: Fast-growing AI automation startupJob Description:As a Founding Engineer, you will build the AI layer designed to autonomously run small businesses. Working alongside a proven technical founder with a massive previous exit, you will ship step-changing features, integrate cutting-edge intelligence into core products, and architect scalable backend systems to enable autonomous operations for thousands of customers.Location: RemoteWhy this role is remarkable:      Join an elite founding team led by a founder who achieved a $300m bootstrapped exit.Exceptional financial stability with a significant internal warchest and real-value equity options.High-agency environment where you build never-before-seen AI features hands-on with absolute autonomy. What you will do:      Build and ship end-to-end product features integrating voice, reasoning, and context management.Architect robust APIs and data pipelines that fuel intelligent agent decision-making.Shape DevOps practices and backend infrastructure for large-scale knowledge extraction and enrichment. The ideal candidate:      Deep expertise in full-stack JavaScript or backend Python with a track record of rapid shipping.High-agency mindset with a strong sense of ownership and the ability to act on imperfect information.AI-fluent engineer who utilizes modern tools to maximize efficiency and deliver top-tier results. Who are Jack & Jill?Ok, I'll go first. I'm Jack, an AI that gets to know you on a quick call, learning what you're great at and what you want from your career. Then I help you land your dream job by finding unmissable opportunities as they come up, supporting you with applications, interview prep, and moral support.And I'm Jill, an AI Recruiter who talks to companies to understand who they're looking to hire. Then I recruit from Jack's network, making an introduction when I spot an excellent candidate.Next stepsStep 1. Visit our website.Step 2. Click 'Talk to Jack'.Step 3. Talk to Jack so he can understand your experience and ambitions.Step 4. Jack will make sure Jill (the AI agent working for the company) considers you for this role.Step 5. If Jill thinks you're a great fit and her client wants to meet you, they will make the introduction.Step 6. If not, Jack will find you excellent alternatives. All for free.We never post fake jobsThis isn't a trick. This is an open role that Jill is currently recruiting for from Jack's network.Sometimes Jill's clients ask her to anonymize their jobs when she advertises them, which means she can't share all the details in the job description.We appreciate this can make them look a bit suspect, but there isn't much we can do about it.Give Jack a spin! You could land this role. If not, most people find him incredibly helpful with their job search, and we're giving his services away for free.                                                                                                                              See more

jd_text: About the job                                                               ROLE: Senior Frontend Engineer We are Two Circles. We are a Sports & Entertainment Marketing business. We grow audiences and revenues. We do that by knowing fans best. We work with clients to help them understand & influence what their fans are doing - the way fans spend their money, the events that fans attend, the channels fans respond to, the content fans watch and more. And we use the understanding this gives us to help our clients grow. Grow their audiences and grow their revenues - both direct to consumer and business to business revenues. Our platforms and services are trusted by over 1000 clients globally, including the English Premier League, Red Bull, UEFA, VISA, the NFL, Nike and Amazon. Presence in our London office for 2 days a week is encouraged for this role and occasional travel to other offices in London and EMEA will be required at times. Experience in agile development practices, continuous integration and test automation via various methods such as unit, integration, contract and E2E testing. jd_text: About the job                                                               About Us  Every business needs to know who they’re really working with whether it’s suppliers, investors, partners, or third parties. jd_text: About the job                                                               Electronic circuit boards are at the core of current and future inventions - mobile phones, augmented reality, autonomous vehicles and spacecrafts. Yet today designing an electronic circuit board is an extremely manual, long and tedious process. At Circuit Mind we believe that this is wrong and we are on a mission to fix it, triggering the future of hardware design.Taking inspiration from the integrated circuit workflow (hardware description language, logic synthesis, automated place and route), we are creating an entirely new software engine for circuit boards, that takes as inputs the requirements of a circuit board and automatically outputs a complete design, ready for manufacture.As a Lead Software Engineer, you’ll take full ownership of the development of large pieces of functionality across the back-end stack of Circuit Mind's products. Our technology stack includes Python 3.11, PostgreSQL, Django, mypy, GraphQL, Docker, Redis, Typescript, React, Apollo.Qualifications      5+ years of professional software development experience.2+ year of professional experience in Python.Strong communication and team-work skills.Experience working in an agile software development environment. title: Frontend Developer
jd_text: About The Company Dyflexis is a pioneering HR technology company dedicated to developing innovative solutions for non-desk workers across various industries such as hotels, retail, and logistics. With a global presence and a team of over 100 professionals, including 45 engineers, Dyflexis is committed to creating products that streamline workforce management and improve operational efficiency. The company operates on a bootstrap model, emphasizing profitability, sustainable growth, and reinvestment in its products and people. Dyflexis prides itself on maintaining a culture of autonomy, collaboration, and continuous innovation, free from venture capital pressures and corporate bureaucracy. About The Role Dyflexis is seeking a highly skilled Lead Frontend Developer to spearhead the development of its frontend architecture and lead a team of 12 engineers. This role offers a unique opportunity to shape the company's next chapter by establishing foundational frontend systems that will scale across Europe and the United States. The ideal candidate will possess extensive experience in building scalable frontend applications, with a deep understanding of Vue.js 3, and a passion for mentoring and leading technical teams. This position emphasizes focused, long-term development cycles, departing from traditional sprint methodologies, allowing for dedicated time to craft high-quality solutions. As a key member of the leadership team, you will collaborate closely with product designers, the engineering manager, and the CEO to deliver impactful features that enhance workforce management software. Qualifications Minimum of 7 years of experience in frontend development, with a proven track record of building and scaling production applications. Expertise in Vue.js 3, with a solid understanding of modern frontend frameworks and best practices. Experience leading and mentoring engineering teams, including conducting code reviews and fostering best practices. Strong architectural skills, capable of making scalable and strategic technology decisions. Familiarity with the tech stack including Ionic, Docker, GitLab CI/CD, React, and containerized deployments. Excellent problem-solving skills, with the ability to anticipate issues and implement preventative solutions. Effective communication skills, capable of working collaboratively with cross-functional teams. Passion for quality, clean code, and continuous improvement. Responsibilities Define and implement the frontend architecture and establish technical standards for multi-market deployment. Lead, mentor, and grow a team of 12 frontend engineers, fostering a culture of excellence and continuous learning. Conduct code reviews, promote best practices, and ensure high-quality code delivery. Guide the development and integration of engagement tools, e-learning systems, and other key features. Make strategic technology decisions that balance immediate needs with long-term scalability and maintainability. Collaborate closely with product and design teams to deliver features aligned with user needs and business goals. Participate actively in the development process, coding alongside the team to set standards and solve complex problems. Identify architectural improvements and technical debt early, implementing solutions before they impact the product. Benefits Dyflexis offers a competitive salary of up to €8,000 per month, with a hybrid work model requiring two days at the company headquarters. Employees gain access to a modern and innovative tech stack, including Vue.js 3, Ionic, Docker, and GitLab CI/CD, providing opportunities to work on impactful projects for renowned clients. The company provides a personal development budget to support ongoing learning and skill enhancement. Additional perks include an in-house chef, ARJ Boxing gym membership, a comprehensive pension plan, 25 vacation days plus your birthday off, and an 8% vacation pay with options to buy or sell vacation days. The work environment emphasizes autonomy, impact, and a collaborative culture where team wins are celebrated and individual contributions are valued. Equal Opportunity Dyflexis is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We value diversity and believe that varied perspectives drive innovation and growth. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected status. We are dedicated to creating a workplace where everyone feels respected, valued, and empowered to contribute their best.… more Benefits found in job post Pension plan
